items.briefing:
Ransomware threats are escalating, with AI now helping cybercriminals launch attacks faster than ever — compressing the time organisations have to respond. A new group called "The Gentlemen" topped ransomware activity rankings in Q2 2026, while the Inc Ransomware group is actively exploiting unpatched vulnerabilities in SonicWall remote access devices. Separately, research shows 79% of organisations have been hit by incidents involving known, patchable vulnerabilities — meaning many breaches are still preventable.

If your organisation uses SonicWall devices for remote access, check with your IT team today to confirm they are fully patched and up to date.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: 81% of Australian organisations already hit by AI security incidents, showing urgent need for local preparedness.
